creator: vadim.2019.nask@gmail.com
text:
Hi all!

After browsing the forum, I found a hint with a solution to stop compiling mysql80-server-8.0.35 with this error, post-316540 SirDice https://forums.freebsd.org/search/351608/?searchform=1&q=316540&o=date. .

Cause of problem: Option enabled by default JAVA_CONFIGURE_ENABLE
to makefile /usr/ports/databases/db5

After disconnecting OFF everything installed successfully without errors.
It’s strange that SirDice noted this error back on April 16, 2016, and it still hasn’t been fixed.


Finally the problem is solved
